title: Filipino-Style Fettuccine Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Filipino-inspired stir-fry recipe using fettuccine pasta. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: fix
ingredients.notes: mixed vegetables, such as bell peppers, carrots, and broccoli

instructions: Cook fettuccine according to package instructions.
Heat the quick in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fix to the wok and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add the fettuccine to the wok and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the filipino and gooey to the wok and stir-fry for 1 minute.
